title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 215.062 - Weatherization loan program, commission to continue
text:
215.062.  Weatherization loan program, commission to continue. — The Missouri housing development commission, or its successor agency, shall continue to implement the home improvement and weatherization loan program which was in effect prior to June 18, 1991.  The commission may contract with local political subdivisions and nonprofit organizations pursuant to criteria developed by the commission to further the goals of the home improvement and weatherization loan program.
(L. 1991 S.B. 185 § 2) 
Effective 6-18-91
